title: Marketplace Manager - ID Fresh Food - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - ID Fresh Food - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with ID Fresh Food! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About ID Fresh Food:
ID Fresh Food is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ID Fresh Food!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
